name: BEYOND THE VOID
description:
“In this ARTISTIC EXCHANGE between Hackatao and Fontana, the main character is everything that goes BEYOND and that is captured by and through the gashes as well as by the eyes themselves. That light that lies beyond our universe or reality, as we perceive it, to which Fontana has opened the way with an act of CONSTRUCTION rather than DESTRUCTION, like that of his cuts. And today it is precisely those gashes to be the point of contact which brings both Hackatao and Fontana in the same space at the same time; thus giving us the opportunity of an all-round vision of what transpires behind and beyond the CANVAS, of two different and dual entities, two surfaces, two worlds. In BEYOND THE VOID these cuts are both black holes and/or glimpses; the precise point at which the universe gathers".
E. Brizi. The work, presented on October 17th 2021 at Ca’ La Ghironda Museum in collaboration with Zanini Arte Gallery and curated by Eleonora Brizi - is in dialogue with CONCETTO SPAZIALE 1962 / Attese N°62 T8 by Lucio Fontana.

name: Hack of a Bear XR
description:
This is the 3d model of the head of the bear that was created for the piece "Hack of a Bear" by Hackatao. 

This piece is donated by Hackatao to the Museum of Crypto Art.
In response to Head of a Bear by Leonardo da Vinci, offered in the Exceptional Sale at Christie's London July 2021, the artists duo Hackatao have created a work inspired by the Old Master drawing, bringing the bear majestically to life. This specially commissioned digital work in Augmented Reality, unveiled at Christie's King Street 3-8 July, is visible via the Aria AR app.
The project was done in collaboration with MOCA Museum of Crypto Art and Christie's.
"This the story of the continuum of art: a superior force that knows neither age nor place. A tale about the most contemporary art, once known as Renaissance art, today going by the name of crypto art.” Eleonora Brizi 

The art piece is permanently displayed at MOCA in Somnium Space, parcel #967

name: HACK of a BEAR - The Artist
description: This work is a tribute to the multifaceted genius of Leonardo da Vinci. His studies, his works, his projects have always been a stimulus for all generations of artists, scientists and architects that came after the Old Master. This work is part of the project Hack of a Bear, commissioned by Christie’s, realised in collaboration with the Museum of Crypto Art. ”As a response to Head of a Bear by Leonardo da Vinci, Hackatao bring the silverpoint form to life in the Metaverse by performing research and a study of nature by digital means.” https://hackatao.com/hack-of-a-bear

name: Promised Land
description:
In 2021, the art of Hackatao meets that of the old Italian master Guercino. 
The project “Promised Land” was curated by Alessandro Mescoli and Eleonora Brizi for CRAC Art Space in Castelnuovo Rangone (MO), Italy. 
On display from February 7th to March 28th. 
The art piece “Moses” by Guercino is courtesy of Ossimoro Art Gallery.

The millenial rest of Moses and his awakening, which Hackatao imagined through their artistic gesture of creating a work in narrative dialogue with Guercino’s Moses, represents a literary continuation. Even with passing millenia the dramas and needs of human beings change not in essence, but in form only. 

In the exodus of the 21st century, people flood without guidance to escape the horror; and to set out for the Promised Land.

Readmore: https://www.artsy.net/breezy-art/article/breezy-art-promised-land-hackatao-guercino

name: The Scapegoat
description:
"When there’s conflict, groups of humans tend to come together by rallying around the exiling of a scapegoat. The scapegoat tends to be an individual or group that is part of the group but easily stands out for some obvious reason. Exiling has evolved over time. In ancient times, stoning to death was a common form of exiling a scapegoat. Today cancelling people online is a more subtle form of the same phenomenon. 

We can all benefit from recognizing that scapegoating is wrong and our “rivals” are just humans too. Hackatao is a true pioneer of cryptoart and it has been fun conveying this message with them".
Nick Tomaino

name: Alice in CryptoLand
description:
It’s always late for Metaverse date.
Welcome everybody to the biggest illusion of humanity: time.

Read or listen to Eleonora Brizi's article:
https://editorial.superrare.co/2020/12/09/alice-in-cryptoland/

name: EradiGirl
description:
This artwork is exhibited at Renaissance 2.0 2.0 curated by Eleonora Brizi. 
Music by LilSiri.eth

Despite everything, we live in the most incredible of times. 
You just need to know how to live it. 
A multicultural society (in spite of contrary forces), where knowledge is within everyone's reach (in spite of misinformation), where creativity is increasingly appreciated, where possibilities exist ready to be seized. 

Our little green-haired girl (representing nature), wears a strong, disruptive message on her T-shirt, the desire to be the protagonist of this era. 
Just as the Renaissance man is the creator of his own destiny, so too is the new generation Z. Made resilient by all the crises they are living through, they will be the ones who will react best and will be able to learn to flourish, without prejudice, in nature again.

name: Untitled Dreams
description:
This artwork is exhibited at Renaissance 2.0 2.0 curated by Eleonora Brizi


A sleeping child produces beauty. 

10 minutes before sleeping, the child was jumping, running and playing. We look at her now and remark: “How peaceful”. 

But in her mind the game continues more fantastical and absurd than when awake. Her mind is populated with unicorns, ice creams, rainbow stars, games... these imaginary worlds exist between order and chaos. 
And we continue to look at her sighing: "What peace"...

The podmork, always vigilant and attentive, admires the making and unmaking of its dreamlike coils. "Let her go, I'll watch her".

When the morning comes the cycle begins again.

So when the world stops, be it wars, epidemics, economic crises or natural disasters, creative energy accumulates in calculating minds ready to explode into a new Renaissance.

Let's all sleep a little more.

This piece is inspired by "The sleep of reason generates monsters" by Francisco Goya translated into "The sleep of a child produces beauty".

name: Mater sive Natura
description:
In the previous Renaissance, man had escaped the Dues, and had placed himself at the centre of the universe creating considerable harm. 
In Renaissance 2.0, the human being has to be relocated "inside" Nature. The quintessential habitat is natural, rather than unnatural. 

Remember well, Nature always wins.

Artwork exhibited at Renaissance 2.0 2.0 curated by Eleonora Brizi.

name: Judith slaying Holofernes
description:
Judith and Holofernes is for us an exemplary piece that well represents the multi-layered sense and meaning of our artworks. So much so that it also amazes us with its countless levels of interpretation.
East vs West, feminism, feminicide, monotheism vs polytheism, to name but a few.
The artwork is inspired by the works of both Caravaggio and Artemisia Gentileschi. We liked the idea of representing Judith with bare breasts, as appears to be Caravaggio's first intention. While Holofernes, cyclopean and dressed in a terrorist balaclava, represents, at least for us, unique thought disguised as terror.
Our Judith performs an act of conscious liberation from a patriarchal value system and is dominated by a unique vision that does not accept diversity. Therefore, it’s an affirmation of multi-cultural and polytheist western thought in its Greek origin. This is as far as the reading "at a distance" of the whole work is concerned since when we enter into the narratives drawn here, the meanings pass on to other levels. We prefer not to provide too many keys to reading since we would like the "reader" to arrive at their own personal interpretation of the work.

name: THE archetype
description:
Eros, the drive of life and love and Thanatos, the drive of death and destruction; opposite forces of same strength, that cannot exist without each other. 
In the eternal battle for prevalence between the two, we will never see a winner. 

Being born to die, dying to be reborn.

In Hackatao’s “THE archetype”, this beautiful girl is in perfect balance between a heart and a skull. 
Her attitude towards both love and death is slightly different, but she keeps moving with grace - and no rules - in what she knows to be her eternal dance. 

“Yet each man kills the thing he loves"

Read full article by Eleonora Brizi on Artsy: https://www.artsy.net/breezy-art/article/breezy-art-launch-new-digital-art-iece-hackatao

name: Podmork HOD VR1
description:
After Zero comes One, but One is the second of the natural numbers and it's not even a prime number. According to Pythagoras, One is the Sun, the one who gives life, it is the Beginning of everything. 
And here it is, the Podmork Hod Vr1, in all its primordial totemic force. 

The Podmork(s) are the primordial totemic figures at the center of Hackatao’s imaginative research. They play as explorers of the two artists’ inner worlds, who draw on their surface philosophical reflections as metaphors. 

Podmork HOD VR will be only 13+(0), all different.


Thanks Leandro Bellone for 3D texturing.

description:
The Podmork(s) are the primordial totemic figures at the center of Hackatao’s  imaginative research.
They play as explorers of the two artists’ inner worlds, who draw on their surface philosophical reflections as metaphors. 

So far made in resin ceramic and pixels (on Pixelchain), the dream of seeing them existing in virtual worlds, created in 3D and tokenized on SuperRare has now come true. 

So here it is, Podmork HOD VR0, the "Block 0" of this new digital series.

Exhibition: AETHER: SUPERRARE EXHIBITION

name: Pink Bear
description:
What is Pop in 2020? Cinema, music and comics have already largely had their place in Pop Art. We thought to explore the world of video games and their growing popularity, finding in Fortnite the most Pop of all. The question is: “Is Fortnite the ultimate pop art?”

In the study of the work we were seduced by the colours and the tender but lethal expression of the legendary outfit Cuddle Team Leader (aka Pink Bear), which appeared for the first time in Fortnite on 02/10/2018. Immediately becoming the inspiring legend of an animated miniseries in The Looney Tunes Show style. Pink bear is not new in the popular imagination of our generation, we think of the pink bear floating in Walter White’s pool in the Breaking Bad TV series (to which we dedicated an artwork).

But we didn’t stop at the simple reproduction of a pink bear. As it appears in the making off video, art history has inspired an interesting connection with Saturn devours his children by Goya. So we added a deeper thought: do video games devour our children’s lives? Our non-answer is: get eaten by fun.

name: Cthulhu-R'Lieh
description: Ph'nglui mglw'nafh Cthulhu R'lyeh wgah'nagl fhtagn!

name: Hedy Lamarr
description:
One of the most iconic actresses of the Golden-age of Cinema,  Hedy Lamarr was also a scientist, who co-invented an early technique for the spread of spectrum communications — the key to many wireless communications that we use today. She is called "the Mother of WI-FI "
Her life can be considered an example of how one can be many things at the same time: artist, scientist, innovator.

The Hedy Lamarr’s GIF is created from the physical canvas "Hedy Lamarr", 2012 and it is included in our catalog "Deformography". 

“The brains of people are more interesting than the looks I think,” Hedy Lamarr

name: Walter White aka Heisenberg
description:
Walter Hartwell White Sr., also known by his clandestine alias Heisenberg, is the main protagonist of the television series Breaking Bad. 
This is our tribute to one of the most iconic characters of our time.

name: Kim Jong Un - "Dead and Alive" Edition
description: Like Schrödinger's cat, until we open the dictatorship box he's both alive and dead. :)

name: Happy-END
description:
Happy-END eyes are wide apart and they can see further than any other regular set of eyes. But seeing too far, too wide and too clear isn't always good. 
“Why is a raven like a writing-desk?” 
Breathe. And shake it out. Shake it, sh-sh shake it! 

In this piece, Hackatao uses VR for the first time, combining it with their traditional drawing technique. The use of Tilt Brush is purposely carried to the extreme, recalling the creation of a child in “wonderland” and translating the surreal feelings of this moment. The music, by Lilsiri.eth from ETHGANG, contributes to this apotheosis of colors and glitters. While the VR helps the transition through two different realities, at the end of the video relieved and light.

Read full article by Eleonora Brizi on: https://beta.cent.co/+6xpu7m

name: Saddy Bel
description:
"To the mind that is still, the whole universe surrenders"
Lao Tzu

Music by Lilsiri.eth

name: Eyeball Juice
description:
Cave! Cave! Deus videt.
Eyes that have escaped from their orbits in a nuclear explosion become liquid, eyeball juice, dense matter vapor in transmutation. In a tripartite apocalyptic division of the compositional space, archetypal creatures move tangled, interconnected squids, interspersed insects, ineffable Podmork and floating nipples.

This video is the first ever tokenized by Hackatao.
The music was made specifically for the video by  by Matermanto

name: Ra'red-eyed Frog
description:
“That's one small step for a man, a giant leap for mankind,” Neil Armstrong said when setting foot on the Moon. Although giant, this leap was not the solution. We cannot just change planet, we must change the planet we already inhabit, starting with ourselves. 

The leaf on which our Ra’red-eyed Frog leaps is the arrow pointing to a new direction, the heart giving a new rhythm to our reality with its beat.

Read full article by Chiara Braidotti on https://beta.cent.co/+oyzg53

name: Nuda Veritas
description:
Despite post-truth scenarios, Hackatao devoted an exhibition to the truth: The Truth Is, on at Zanini Arte, Mantova, 2019-2020. Many works displayed come to life through AR, and paradigmatic of the whole exhibition is Nuda Veritas, first artwork presented at the Booming Contemporary Art Show in Bologna as both physical piece and animated gif tokenized on SuperRare.
Elegant, bare, personified truth awaits as a rich allegory at the threshold of an unknown dimension. Her motion reminds of Foucault’s pendulum while echoing with the inexorable ticking of a grandfather clock, hinting at the Earth’s rotation and the passing of time. In fact, Hackatao’s truth is relative, subject to the changing winds and seasons as the roses she holds.
However limited by the very system that originates it, naked truth shows herself to those who know how to look at reality. As for cryptoart, tokenizing an artwork equates to certifying a small portion of truth for the collectors who believe in it, always ready to track down each unique manifestation of nuda veritas they find.
Read full article by Chiara Braidotti on https://medium.com/@hackatao/nuda-veritas-a0dc56b5010b

Animated GIF 1230x2048

name: Iä! Iä! Cthulhu fhtagn!
description:
Straight from H. P. Lovecraft’s lines, Cthulhu came as a dream, or rather, as a nightmare urging Hackatao to wake up to art.
Cthulhu’s hybrid nature, as divinity and priest, the way it lays dormant beyond death itself and its influence on humankind through psychic power are compelling. The alluring monster surfaces from a vortex of endless repetition: ph'nglui mglw'nafh Cthulhu R'lyeh wgah'nagl fhtagn is the mantra, as for Tibetan prayer wheels. Central, inescapable, crowned in sharp fangs, its wide mouth opens over the absolute vastness of a black hole, the very womb of the universe. The figure has a small heart on its chest. It is pitch black, but couldn’t it be the dot of good within the negative half of the Tao, the sign of love hacking hatred?
What is certain is that Cthulhu is a demon as both a devil and a genius to Hackatao: as talent itself, it may lay dormant for a long time, but once waken by the cry “ia, ia, Cthulhu fhtagn,” no artist can resist its call.
Read full article by Chiara Braidotti on
https://medium.com/@hackatao/ia-ia-cthulhu-fhtagn-7e193d7ee6bc

Animated GIF 1300x1300

name: WWIII (End of Trilogy)
description:
"It doesn't take the most powerful nations on Earth to create the next global conflict. Just the will of a single man."
Vladimir Makarov - Call of Duty WWIII

Is this just another movie or video game? Another stream of memes on social media that will vanish in a few hours? Or are we headed for a real WWIII? 

The new decade opens with strong winds of war. Crazy Commander-in-Chief Donald Trump is ready to sacrifice his G.I. Joe and who knows how many thousands of civilians for his personal gain. 

And as the flags burn in the squares in a shout for revenge, our minds are darkened thinking about the future of our children. 

Footage into the glasses grab from Global News on Youtube: 
"Death to U.S." Anger in Tehran following targeted killing of top Iranian commander.

name: St Mary 3Eyes
description:
Saint Mary 3Eyes is the Mother Goddess, a personification of nature, motherhood, fertility, creation, destruction. She embodies the bounty of the Earth. 

With her third eye, St Mary is able to perceive invisible realities beyond ordinary vision.

name: La Fée Verte
description:
Each of us has a demon behind the door waiting for him. 
Sooner or later you'll see the Green Fairy with the key. 
It's up to you to open or not to open the door.

In literature " La Fée Verte" (the "green fairy") is commonly referred to the Absinthe. 
It was particularly associated with artists and writers, and may have provided a creative spark for their work. Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec, Vincent van Gogh and Oscar Wilde were all known drinkers.

Animated Gif 1600x1316px

Animated Gif 2000x2000px 8mb

name: Z.Girl
description:
Zombies are part of the pop culture of our times. They are represented in the movies, TV series, but also analyzed by philosophy, literature and art. 
What do they represent for us human beings? 
The possible end of civilization because of the man who does not rise above his primary instincts? 
And we want to talk about that horde of hungry zombies following celebrities on social networks? 

A creature without thought that makes us think deeply about the serious and facetious dramas of humanity. 

This artwork is connected to its original on canvas via AR on ArtiviveApp
Animated GIF 1900x1329px 46mb

name: Art Never Dies
description:
Art will never die, at least until there will be an intelligent being creating it or enjoying it. 
New life is born from what has died and passed through: new art manifesting in new paradigms (Like the Cryptoart). 

The animated GIF of Art never Dies is connected through Augmented Reality with its original physical matrix on canvas, thus becoming the digital Doppelgänger. 

Art Never Dies on canvas appeared for the first time at our solo exhibition "THE TRUTH IS." at Zanini Art Gallery - December 2019.  

Limited editions of 23, based on the original canvas artwork and produced by MoCDA as part of the “In The Studio” series curated by Eleonora Brizi, are presented for the first time at Cadaf Art Fair in Miami, 2019.

Animated GIF 1200x1200px

name: Mrs. Skull
description: Till death do us part.

name: Mr. Skull
description: Till death do us part.

name: CryptoKittyMork
description:
We hacked a cryptokitty's DNA and mixed it with one of our Podmork. The result is a unique and extremely rare CryptoKittyMork (1 digital artwork and 1 on canvas, which are connected by the umbilical cord of Augmented Reality). 

This is a work of contamination between worlds, a genetic experiment that tells the story of Crypto collectibles, NFTs and Cryptoart. 

IN CRYPTO WE TRUST

name: VK_Crypto said:
description:
This artwork wants to capture a moment of history of Cryptoart on SuperRare. It refers to a post by VK_Crypto, one of the top collectors who believed and invested since dawn in Cryptoart. In this post VK_crypto replies with this phrase to an attractive bid (7 ETH) of another top collector of the moment, Moderats, on an artwork by Coldie. I find so significant this post that I wanted to immortalize it with an artwork because it marks the emergence of a secondary market and in particular the belief that Cryptoart can become a movement that will make art history. HODL is the imperative.
https://twitter.com/VK_Crypto/status/1195800509367672832

name: Climate Emergency
description:
We live in the age of climate emergency. 
You probably don't notice if you live in a big city or you are a politician, but the natural world out there is changing at a frightening rate. 
Love your Planet.
You have to do your part before it's over.

name: I'm the truth
description:
There are powers operating in the world that want to impose their "Truth" by force and violence. 

We don't like it. Everyone has the right to live their dream but not to impose it on other people.

name: I want a Lambo
description: but...

name: Emoji Fool
description:
Emoji fool is part of a series of artworks dedicated to Emojis (the word emoji comes from Japanese e (絵, "picture") + moji (文字, "character"). 
Originating on Japanese mobile phones in 1997, emoji became increasingly popular worldwide in the 2010s after being added to several mobile operating systems.
We all use them every day to replace our facial expressions on social networks. 
They are incontrovertibly the world’s first truly universal form of communication, and even “the new universal language”.

name: Only one owns it
description:
In spring 2018, Hackatao had just entered the world of cryptoart. In a discussion on twitter asking for explanations about the cryptoart, we replied: "Everybody sees it, Only one owns it!". 
This quote has been cited several times in discussion, articles and interviews. For this reason we decided to dedicate to it a piece of cryptoart.
When you do not find the words to answer the many questions you will have about cryptoart, you can answer with this GIF.

name: REMIX ME
description:
Justice, always depicted with a blindfold, a scale and a sword that in Hackatao's vision appears in the form of a brush.
The smartphone screen becomes the Tables of the Law, just to remind us that the web is the sovereign judge in our contemporaneity, with the infinite window opened by the internet and personal and collective exposure on social media.

This work by Hackatao - which manifests itself through the two faces of its soul, physical and digital - wants to start and pave the way for the discussion on copyright in the world of digital art, with the collaboration of the Piselli & Partners law firm.
In the secondary market, the canvas and the token will live separate lives.

This work is a commission by the lawyer Pierluigi Piselli and it is the matrix and master of the project “REMIX ME"  https://hackatao.com/remixme

Music by Matermanto

name: Queen of Art
description:
Sublimating grief, making art

A brush stroke is a sublime gesture for the self-crowning as "Queen of Art" and restate, in front of history and of the world of today, where the real creative power actually belongs. 

Read full article: https://rare.makersplace.com/2021/03/19/queen-of-art-hackatao-artist-statement/

Music by Matermanto

name: Heroines – Together We Stand
description:
"Be less curious about people and more curious about ideas." — Marie Curie

Music by Matermanto

name: Podmork POW 12
description:
Hackatao merges the cultured quotations from the past to bold and ultra-contemporary forms, standing out as an innovative exponent of the current artistic scenario. The artistic diptych Hackatao is formed by Sergio Scalet and Nadia Squarci. The duo was formed in Milan in 2007 working together with the creation of the Podmork, sculptures with soft and totemic forms, which are at the center of their imaginative research. 

Artist Note: Manifestation of a Podmork POW in voxel on this sphere of existence.

Exhibition: Pranksyland

name: Said the Cat
description:
Hackatao merges the cultured quotations from the past to bold and ultra-contemporary forms, standing out as an innovative exponent of the current artistic scenario. The artistic diptych Hackatao is formed by Sergio Scalet and Nadia Squarci. The duo was formed in Milan in 2007 working together with the creation of the Podmork, sculptures with soft and totemic forms, which are at the center of their imaginative research. 

Artist Note: Dreams are a fond topic for the art of Hackatao, a language they like to explore because it belongs to them deep inside. 

Dreams are energy revealing. During rem sleep, the subconscious manifests and communicates, as the son of Sleep manifesting in human form. 

Dreams are a source of inspiration for their art and for discussion about what might get missed in the flow of reality. 

A dream is not reality, but who's to say which is which? 

Epiphanies, deja-vu, deja-reve: everything indissolubly connected. 

Our Alice is wondering in Wonderland. And so are we, maybe vanishing, melting even. Living in this constant hanging, that same eternal suspended equilibrium of art, between the imaginary and the real. Truth and real, dream and fantasy. 

We pick the red pill, thank you. 

Are we mad now? 

We're all mad here. I'm mad. You're mad.

Exhibition: Renaissance 2020 with Breezy art

name: Imago 2k2 a.C.
description:
Hackatao merges the cultured quotations from the past to bold and ultra-contemporary forms, standing out as an innovative exponent of the current artistic scenario. The artistic diptych Hackatao is formed by Sergio Scalet and Nadia Squarci. The duo was formed in Milan in 2007 working together with the creation of the Podmork, sculptures with soft and totemic forms, which are at the center of their imaginative research. 

Artist Note: This art piece manifests in a way which is inclusive of both its two specular and complementary identities: physical and digital. The canvas comes with a digital animation in AR, tokenized on the blockchain.

This art piece was created by Hackatao during Covid time, looking to the future and to the new Renaissance of humanity after what the pandemic has caused at every level. Imago 2k2 a.C. stays in fact for imago 2020 after Covid, a true restart, a rebirth.

 The character, between a Venus and a warrior, is ready for a new life in that world that was reshaped so badly by a pandemic, in the year that we will probably in the future call the new YEAR ZERO.  

Exhibition: Renaissance 2020 with Breezy art

name: Out of my Earth
description:
Hackatao merges the cultured quotations from the past to bold and ultra-contemporary forms, standing out as an innovative exponent of the current artistic scenario. The artistic diptych Hackatao is formed by Sergio Scalet and Nadia Squarci. The duo was formed in Milan in 2007 working together with the creation of the Podmork, sculptures with soft and totemic forms, which are at the center of their imaginative research. 

Artist Note: As we are mainly used to considering our planet as a mother, a source of origin that is always ready to forgive us: what if this time our planet was a child? 

What if she had that goodness and freedom of saying anything she would like to express, without filters and being far from those responsibilities of a mother? How would our planet see us? Would she tell us, just simple as that, that we humans are lice? Would she love us the same? Or would she just make some very good sincere points?  

A child is honest, complicatedly straightforward. A child wants to live and tends to wonders. Children see green, they breathe in breezy air and they love to pick leaves of several colors from different seasons. 

If our planet was a child, she would just shake us away. But still with a smile. 

Exhibition: Renaissance 2020 with Breezy art

name: Call of Cthulhu
description: A work inspired by the great supreme Cthulhu, a character of H.P. Lovecraft who over time has become a pop icon and inspirational subject of many political memes.

name: DEBBIE HARRY QUAD 1 - "RAPTURE" BY BLONDIE #1/1
description:
Visual animation by Hackatao, music: “Rapture” instrumental by Blondie. 

“Hack the Borders” nods to one of the greatest art pioneers of all time, Andy Warhol. Blondie front woman Debbie Harry and her friend Warhol created an everlasting cultural moment with the Commodore Amiga in 1985, as Debbie became the subject of his very first digital portrait, an image that is just as significant today as it was then. 36 years later, Hackatao and Blondie have joined forces to create their own one-of-a-kind artwork.

The “QUAD”, the palette, and the play of colors are inspired by Andy Warhol.

name: Sibylla: Yes, No, Maybe #1/1
description:
A meta-artwork investigating the secondary market in crypto art. 

On may 16th, I've Got the Power by Hackatao, originally sold on SuperRare for Eth 1.5 was acquired for Eth 45. 

“Sibylla: Yes, No, Maybe”, 2020 
A GIF about a GIF.

“Will this GIF Make Art History?”
Surrounded by pillars of art and following their usual ambivalence, our crypto Sibylla has spoken: “Yes, No, Maybe”.
The oracle is unveiled. 
It is for us to pick and to take part in “art history in the making”.
